EXCHANGE.KYC_AML_INFO.ACCORDION.FAQ.0.QU: Why is there a KYC/AML procedure?
EXCHANGE.KYC_AML_INFO.ACCORDION.FAQ.0.AN: The crypto market is a subject of certain rules and regulations which make it mandatory for most crypto services to have certain procedures implemented according to European Anti-Money Laundering (AML) and Know Your Customer (KYC) regulations.
EXCHANGE.KYC_AML_INFO.ACCORDION.FAQ.1.AN: To proceed with the verification process, please contact support@changenow.io and follow the instructions provided. As soon as we receive the information required under KYC/AML regulations, the exchange will be completed.
EXCHANGE.KYC_AML_INFO.ACCORDION.FAQ.2.AN:
To refuse the KYC procedure, please contact our support at support@changenow.io. In case of refusal, we will not be able to proceed with the transaction, and we will issue a refund to the originating address.

Please note that the procedure will differ if the address is suspected in connection to illegal activity. In such cases, we will not be able to issue a refund without KYC, and we will require additional documents. Please contact our support team for more information.

SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSWER: The crypto bridge is designed to enable asset and data movement across different blockchains. Due to the isolated nature of blockchain platforms, interoperability is provided by a cross-chain bridge: it locks assets on one chain and issues its equivalent tokens on another.
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.2.QUESTION: How long does it take to bridge crypto?
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER: In the case of crypto bridging, this greatly depends on a blockchain network: over ChangeNOW, the most cross-chain bridging operations take less than 5 minutes to complete. However, congestion on networks like the Arbitrum bridge or Solana bridge can sometimes cause delays.
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.3.QUESTION: Where can I bridge BTC with the Avalanche Bridge?
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER: ChangeNOW's token bridge solutions can facilitate swapping BTC for Avalanche-compatible assets quickly and securely.
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUESTION: What is cross-chain?
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSWER: Cross-chain refers to the interoperability between blockchains that allows seamless asset and data movement across networks. Bridges like those offered by ChangeNOW enable this process, which helps users swap tokens between different ecosystems, such as Ethereum, Solana, and Arbitrum.
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.5.QUESTION: How does a cross-chain bridge work?
SWAP.FAQ.ITEMS.5.ANSWER: A cross-chain bridge works by locking assets on the source chain and minting an equivalent amount on the destination chain. For example, if you use a defi bridge to move SOL from Solana to Ethereum, the bridge locks the original SOL and releases a bridge coin representing SOL on Ethereum (wrapped Solana, or wSol). Some bridges use liquidity pools to facilitate instant swaps without locking assets.

DEFI_COINS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSWER:
A DeFi coin earns its place among the best DeFi tokens based on a combination of utility, adoption, innovation, and trust. The most successful DeFi crypto coins are those that power real, functional decentralized finance protocols — whether it’s for lending, staking, trading, yield farming, or governance.

Key factors that define top DeFi projects include:
  • Strong use case: The token should serve a clear function within a working DeFi protocol — not just exist for speculation.
  • High adoption & liquidity:The best DeFi coins are widely used, listed on major exchanges, and offer deep liquidity.
  • Security & audits:A trustworthy DeFi token is backed by secure smart contracts that have undergone formal audits and community review.
  • Active development:Ongoing updates, GitHub commits, and roadmap progress signal that the project is evolving and sustainable.
  • Decentralized governance:Many top DeFi tokens offer holders the ability to vote on upgrades, parameter changes, or treasury use.
  • Cross-chain or Layer 2 support:Leading tokens increasingly support multiple chains (Ethereum, Arbitrum, BNB Chain, etc.) or are integrated into Layer 2 scaling solutions — boosting usability.
In short, the best DeFi crypto is more than a coin — it’s part of an ecosystem that solves real problems in a decentralized, transparent way. Always research before investing: not every token listed in a DeFi crypto list deserves your attention.

TOKENS.BUG_BOUNTY.SECTION_1.LIST.ITEM_5: Do not attack the reliability or integrity of our services (e.g, no DDoS attacks or similar questionable acts). If in doubt, please email us at bugbounty@changenow.io
TOKENS.BUG_BOUNTY.SECTION_2.LABEL: What are the Services in Scope?
TOKENS.BUG_BOUNTY.SECTION_2.TEXT: All tools and services provided by ChangeNOW, NOW Payments are eligible for our Bug Bounty, including services offered through ChangeNOW API, ChangeNOW's widgets and buttons, NOW Payments' widgets, buttons, and invoice links, ChangeNOW Android app, and ChangeNOW Affiliate Pack products.
TOKENS.BUG_BOUNTY.SECTION_3.LABEL: What are the Qualifying Bugs?
TOKENS.BUG_BOUNTY.SECTION_3.TEXT: Any issues that could result in substantial financial loss, customers' or internal data breach, or service degradation is within scope.
TOKENS.BUG_BOUNTY.SECTION_4.LABEL: What bugs are Non-Qualifying Bugs?
TOKENS.BUG_BOUNTY.SECTION_4.TEXT: Depending on their impact, some disclosures may not qualify. Vulnerabilities in the software packages not produced by ChangeNOW, domain hosted by third parties, services operated by third parties based on ChangeNOW and/or NOW Payments APIs, and subdomains are out of the Bug Bounty scope.
TOKENS.BUG_BOUNTY.SECTION_5.LABEL: How to Disclose?
TOKENS.BUG_BOUNTY.SECTION_5.TEXT_1: You can disclose a vulnerability by filling the form above or by sending an email with your bug report to support@changenow.io
TOKENS.BUG_BOUNTY.SECTION_5.TEXT_2: A bug report should include a description of the bug, reproduction instructions, and security impact (low, medium, high, critical).
TOKENS.BUG_BOUNTY.SECTION_5.TEXT_3: ChangeNOW reserves the right to requalify the security impact. All rewards are unique and the amount rewarded depends on the security impact in question.  All bounties are payable only in NOW tokens.

BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.TITLE: Corporate Responsibility
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.TEXT_1: We believe that the crypto industry should be based on the principles of transparency, mutual trust, and constant improvement.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.TEXT_2: ChangeNOW seeks to maintain accountability to its customers, employees, and the broad crypto community. We do it through strict AML compliance, social change encouragement, regular service quality upgrades, and community involvement.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.CUSTOMER.TITLE: Customer
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.CUSTOMER.TEXT: We value our customers, protect them from scams, always advocate their interests, and help to keep their assets safe.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.COMMUNITY.TEXT:
We promote mass adoption of crypto and seek to turn the crypto world into
a healthy environment for collaboration and innovation.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.INDUSTRY.TITLE: Industry
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_1.INDUSTRY.TEXT: We believe that the crypto industry is no place for money laundering, dodgy schemes, and unlawful activities.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.split-yo: We help our customers to avoid double-spending caused by the BCH/BSV/BCHA unsplit coins problem. Even if the transaction has already gone through, we will try to return the funds within a 24-hour period, if it is physically possible.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CUSTOMERS.TEXT: Our key priority is protecting users from all kinds of scams, along with helping to deal with consequences of unfortunate network malfunctions. The ChangeNOW support team is available 24/7 and ready to give guidance to the customers who faced operational difficulties. We always return assets lost due to accidental sendings or unsplit coins transactions, for instance, in case of BCH/BSV/BCHA failed transactions.

Here at ChangeNOW, we do all in our power to help our customers restore justice in case a crypto fraud has been committed. ChangeNOW fully cooperates with the police and other executive bodies that investigate crypto-related crimes. We leave no stone unturned in order to help our customers get back what is rightfully theirs.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.COMMUNITY.TITL: Recognizing our responsibilities to the global community
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.COMMUNITY.TEXT: Raising trust towards the crypto industry is in our own hands. A way of contributing to the community that we find crucial is promoting mass adoption of crypto. In our ongoing efforts to accelerate the widespread use of digital currencies, we constantly improve the quality of our services and perfect customer relations. The ChangeNOW team wishes to establish trust within the industry and create a safe environment for crypto operations.

A fundamental part of community involvement is charity. We choose not to make a public display of our philanthropic initiatives, making an exception for the cases that affect us profoundly in some way. For one, we donated 1 BTC for Notre Dame restorations through our partner's charity fund. Another charitable collaboration of ours is Monero Instant Exchange: part of the service’s profits are donated directly to the Monero Project.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.INDUSTRY.TITLE: Over $16,500,000 returned in total
We are convinced that the crypto industry is no place for dirty money, unlawful operations, and shady business schemes. Despite the crypto community's common efforts, hacks and scams still frequently occur on the market, casting a shadow over the entire industry. However, we strongly believe that a scam-free future for crypto is quite conceivable. It will require a great deal of trust and a safe environment – and building them is exactly what ChangeNOW is aimed at.

The ChangeNOW team has put in place a number of AML mechanisms designed to detect fraud and filter suspicious transactions. We are not to disclose the exact KYT, KYC, and KYB procedures that every transaction undergoes for obvious security reasons.  To make sure no fraudulent activity escapes our notice, we use both an automated internal compliance check algorithm and an external AML-compliance provider.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.emerald-: On September 9th 2020, a DeFi project called Emerald Mine (EMD) committed an exit scam, appropriating nearly $2.5 million worth of crypto. 135020 EOS have been stopped on ChangeNOW, thanks to our risk management system.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.uniswap-: ChangeNOW is the first instant crypto exchange service to integrate a decentralized liquidity provider into its platform – Uniswap. This collaboration allows anyone to use ChangeNOW as a one stop bridge between ERC20 assets and easily swap tokens listed on Uniswap.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.the-stor: The Story of How a Cryptocurrency Exchange Service Lost Money, Intentionally

During the DOGE hype in the end of January 2021, ChangeNOW processed all the stuck DOGE transactions at the initial estimated rate, suffering substantial losses in order to deliver the service promised to the customers.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.report-o: Report on the Temporary Slowdown of BTC Processing

On August 6, 2021, one of the nodes crucial to Bitcoin exchange functionality on ChangeNOW temporarily stopped working. We had to activate two backup nodes before the service became fully operational again.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.changeno: ChangeNOW Returns $15M Lost in Compound Malfunction

After the Compound DeFi platform lost funds due to a bug, ChangeNOW received a 45505 COMP transaction request involving the misplaced COMP tokens. It had been flagged by our AML system, and we returned the assets to Compound.

In recent months, there have been numerous cases of Ripple giveaway scams where people lost huge amounts of money. ChangeNOW does its best to help victims, and here is how we helped return $100,000 worth of XRP to rightful owners.
ChangeNOW Returns 60 ETH Stolen by Phishing Uniswap App

Phishing, along with rug pulls and smart contract hacks, has been one of greatest threats to users’ funds in recent years. We managed to withhold compromised 60 ETH worth $210,000 at the time and return them to their rightful owner. Here is what happened.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.bitrue-p: $320,000 returned to Singapore-based crypto exchange Bitrue

After his exchange had suffered a hack, we established the malicious addresses and immediately blacklisted them. $320,000 were attempted to be transferred through ChangeNOW - we froze them and returned to Bitrue.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.upbit-ha: Money laundering prevented after Upbit hack

Soon after this South Korean crypto exchange was compromised, our risk prevention system stopped the test transaction of 9 ETH - we immediately froze the funds and transferred them to a secure storage.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.gatehub-: 500,000 XRP returned to a hacked wallet service

In June 2019, 2.5 million XRP from hacked GateHub crypto wallets were sent to us as fraudsters wanted to cash out. We managed to retain more than 500,000 XRP. These funds were returned to the wallet service.
BUSINESS_ETHICS.SECTION_2.CASES.changeno: 100% of funds worth $500,000 retained upon Bithumb hack
When the exchange Bithumb was hacked, over $500,000 ended up on ChangeNOW. We froze all stolen deposits. They were stored in a secure cold wallet until an official request from law enforcement.
In September 2020, Eterbase exchange was hacked. Our risk management system stopped a transaction of 600,000 MATIC, that were subsequently returned to the exchange.
ChangeNOW Returns $100k to XRP Scam Giveaway Victims
LAUNCHPAD_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.6.ANSWER: Listing your crypto token on ChangeNOW offers increased exposure to a broader audience of crypto enthusiasts, potentially attracting more investors and users. This partnership provides access to unlimited liquidity, allowing for easy token exchange and enhancing its utility. Moreover, being part of ChangeNOW's ecosystem opens doors to collaboration opportunities with other projects and platforms in the crypto space, fostering community growth and visibility for your token.
LAUNCHPAD_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.7.QUESTION: Is there an asset API I can look into?
LAUNCHPAD_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.7.ANSWER: Sure! Feel free to consult our free API documentation to see all coins and tokens that are already listed on ChangeNOW. Once your currency is supported on ChangeNOW, it will show as available in the API endpoint.
LAUNCHPAD_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.8.QUESTION: How long does it take to list a coin or a token?
LAUNCHPAD_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.8.ANSWER: The duration of the process depends on the complexity of the integration and the type of blockchain your asset is represented on. Tokens on common networks like ERC20, BEP20, TRC20 and others are usually listed quicker than Mainnet coins. The listing timeline will be clearly communicated to you at the start of the integration. Just fill out our Listing form, and our team will give you an estimation of the listing timeframe.
LAUNCHPAD_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.9.QUESTION: How to accept payments for presale?
LAUNCHPAD_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.9.ANSWER: Accept payments for your presale via NOWPayments, a secure and efficient payment gateway that supports various cryptocurrencies.
LAUNCHPAD_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.10.QUESTION: What are your fees?

LIGHTNING.ARTICLE: Zero-Fee Public Lightning Network Node Provided by ChangeNOW
LIGHTNING.INFO_ARTICLE: LightningNOW’s main goal is running a stable, reliable, and well-connected Lightning node to help provide easier channel creation between Lightning Network users.
LIGHTNING.INFO_ARTICLE_2: If you need us to open an inbound channel to your node, just hit us up for a payment channel to our node. We'll get back to you shortly with an inbound payment channel.
LIGHTNING.FEATURES_ARTICLE_1: Lightning transactions allow you to make instant payments without having to wait for any confirmations. All payments are instantly secured by smart contracts without having to transact on-chain.
LIGHTNING.FEATURES_ARTICLE_2: By transacting and settling off-chain, the Lightning Network allows for extremely low fees, which allows for instant micropayments in a couple of clicks.
LIGHTNING.FEATURES_ARTICLE_3: Lightning Network is capable of an astounding amount of transactions per second across the network. Attaching payment per action/click is now possible without custodians.
LIGHTNING.FEATURES_ARTICLE_4: Cross-chain atomic exchanges can occur off-chain instantly with  blockchain consensus rules. So long as the chains can support the same crypto hash function, it is possible to preform trustless cross-chain exchanges within seconds.

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_NEW_COTI.ABOUT.TEXTS: First and foremost, COTI is a next-generation blockchain-based payment platform having a namesake native cryptocurrency. Since 2019, it helps companies to create advanced fintech solutions to save time and money. COTI Pay performs quick and safe payments, white label payment network allows creating one’s own proprietary payment system with smaller fees and greater control, and the blockchain-based loyalty networks increase the profits and customer retention.

The project started off in 2016, and its mainnet went live in 2019. Its co-founders, fintech specialists Samuel Falkon and David Assaraf, were inspired by Satoshi Nakamoto’s idea of a peer-to-peer payment network. The team is based in Tel Aviv, Israel.
COTI’s market rank is 335. Its market cap is over $23MM, and the price is about $0.04. COTI’s all-time high equals $0,12.
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_NEW_COTI.USD_SECTION: COTI is a promising cryptocurrency, and it uses a blockchain that will revolutionize online payments. Owning or trading COTI is in demand, and ChangeNOW promises fast and secure COTI to USD transactions. It will take place with the best possible rates, and there is no need to worry about hidden costs.
ChangeNOW cares about your privacy and security. We are a non-custodial service, and we never control, store, or hold your funds in any way.
The average transaction does not take more than two minutes, and we aim to reduce the times further in the future.
ChangeNOW is a versatile service that adapts to the crypto market. We add new and upcoming cryptocurrencies regularly and follow new trends.
There is no need to register or provide any personal info for exchanging crypto. ChangeNOW simply needs your wallet data for sending the funds, and that's it!
Our service works no matter how large is the amount involved.
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_NEW_DOCK.ABOUT.TEXTS: First and foremost, DOCK is a platform that helps businesses with creating verifiable credentials. It eliminates problems with existing data solutions such as cross-platform incompatibility, information inexactness, etc. With Dock, you can issue a DID — Decentralized Identifier — a transparent, verifiable, and easily accessible source of information about citizenship, education, licenses, etc. In Dock, this data is accurate and individually-owned.

Dock is run by a globally spread multicultural team of Dock Labs and governed by the Dock Association. Founded in 2017, the project aims at bringing more transparency and user-friendliness into the market of credentials.
In November 2020, Dock’s market cap was about $7.7MM. The current price is somewhat near $0,012 with a maximum of $0,24 achieved in May 2018. Dock is ranking 594th on Coinmarketcap.
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_NEW_DOCK.USD_SECTION: Dock is a great asset to own, trade, and invest into. Most importantly, our DOCK exchange service uses the best possible rates, and you can receive the exact amounts as our DOCK calculator suggests. This makes planning your spending much easier!

Trade for as much as you want! There is no upper limit to use our service, and we will complete the transaction no matter how large the amount.
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_NEW_ETHEREUM.ABOUT.T: First and foremost, Ethereum is an open-source platform that allows building decentralized applications (DApps) with the help of smart contract technology. Launched in 2015, it has experienced a tremendous increase in popularity: today, there are hundreds of Ethereum-based tokens. Thanks to the easily programmable ERC-20 token format, there was a great ICO boom in 2017 and the DeFi hype in 2020. Both crazes were mainly based on Ethereum.
The platform has been established by 8 co-founders. At the moment, it is led by a large team. However, it is only Vitalik Buterin who is performing the role of the project’s curator.

Ether, or ETH, is the native cryptocurrency of Ethereum. It’s ranking 2nd on Coinmarketcap with a constantly growing price over $500. Ethereum’s market cap is over $66MM. There is no max supply, and the current supply exceeds 113.5MM.

To understand how to create an asset and give it value, one must first understand how the Synthetix network works. For one to make a digital product, they first have to offer collateral in the native token called SNX. This ensures that the collective pool of holders acts as a counterparty to the deal when converting minted synths to any real-world asset.

For context, if one wants to make a stable coin that tracks the U.S dollar, they would first use an SNX converter to move their other cryptos or fiat into SNX. They can then stake that amount and create a stablecoin.

Previously known as Republic Protocol, REN is a blockchain project that aims to bring interoperability and privacy in the DeFi ecosystem. Essentially, REN makes it possible for users to transfer supported coins and tokens across blockchains. This is done in a trust-less and fully decentralised environment. SELL_CRYPTO.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUESTION: What should I do if my fiat payout is delayed?
REN employs the concept of dark pools. Dark pools are over the counter markets that allow investors to make significant asset purchases, and they exist in both crypto and traditional financial markets. However, in conventional markets, one is never sure that the centralised party making the transaction possible will keep the purchase secure and anonymous. REN enables the process of dark pool trade to happen in a trust-less environment.

The other system that has to be understood is REM Virtual Machine. It is connected with networks called Darknodes, which help to identify and process transactions between blockchains protocols, and it is a trust-less process. REN token is used to pay fees for transactions made on the RENVM.

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_NEW_WAVES.ABOUT.HEAD: What is Waves?
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_NEW_WAVES.ABOUT.TEXT: WAVES is a decentralized blockchain-based service with its own cryptocurrency. Its main task is to exchange tokens. In addition, it is possible to support the so-called “Colored coins”. These include crypto assets that can be created by each member of the system. For example, it is possible to carry out tokenization of the company's shares or create a joint financing project.

In addition, users have the opportunity to create their own game token, a tokenized ticket to the event or even a means of payment. In this regard, WAVES has some similarities with NXT. However, there are differences, such as an advanced scripting language. This factor brings WAVES closer to Ethereum.

WAVES mining is impossible in the traditional sense. Only some members who are selected by the balance of the token can generate new coins. The rest of the network members have the right to transfer their tokens to delegates so that they have the opportunity to mine. The number of nodes is limited to 100, and finding a block takes around 10 seconds.

ChangeNOW's fiat gateway services allow users to buy and sell cryptocurrencies using traditional fiat currencies like USD, EUR, and more. This service ensures a seamless bridge between the traditional financial system and the crypto world, making it easier for users to enter and exit the crypto market. Key specifics include:

  • Wide range of fiat currencies: Supports multiple fiat currencies to cater to a global audience.

DEV_KIT_LOANS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.QUESTION: How does ChangeNOW's fee structure work?
DEV_KIT_LOANS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER:
ChangeNOW prides itself on transparency with our fee structures. The exchange rates displayed include all fees, ensuring there are no hidden charges. These are the possible fees that are included in the transaction:
  • network fee for the deposit transaction from a customer's wallet;
  • network fee for transferring coins to our liquidity provider;
  • trading fees that our liquidity providers charge;
  • network fee for sending the exchanged funds to the customer.
The fees are competitive and reflect the service's commitment to providing value. The exact fee can vary based on the specific transaction, cryptocurrency pair, and market conditions. Users can always check the exact fee before confirming any transaction. Read more about ChangeNOW's fee structures.
DEV_KIT_LOANS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUESTION: How can I start integrating ChangeNOW into a new or existing project?
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.0.QUESTION: How to integrate ChangeNOW into my dApp?
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.0.ANSWER:
To integrate ChangeNOW into your decentralized application (dApp), you can use the ChangeNOW API. Here’s how:
  • Get API Key: Register on the ChangeNOW platform to obtain your API key.
  • API Documentation: ChangeNOW offers comprehensive documentation that guides you through the whole integration process.
  • Implementation: Follow the step-by-step guide to implement the API, enabling crypto exchange functionality within your dApp.
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.QUESTION: Are crypto exchanges dApps?
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSWER: Not all crypto exchanges are decentralized. Traditional exchanges are centralized, meaning they are operated by a central entity. However, some exchanges, known as decentralized exchanges (DEXs), function as dApps, facilitating peer-to-peer trading without intermediaries.
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.QUESTION: How to create a dApp?
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER:
Creating a dApp involves several main steps:
  • Choose a Blockchain: Select a blockchain platform like Ethereum or Binance Smart Chain.
  • Smart Contracts: Build smart contracts using languages like Solidity.
  • Development Tools: Utilize tools like Truffle or Hardhat for development.
  • Frontend and Backend Development: Create your app's front and back end.
  • Deployment: Deploy your smart contract, making your dApp accessible to users.
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.QUESTION: What is a crypto exchange API?
DAPPS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER:
A crypto exchange API allows developers to integrate exchange functionalities into their dapps. The API provides endpoints for:
  • Exchange: Execute buy and sell orders.
  • Market Data: Retrieve real-time market information.
  • Account Management: Access and manage user accounts and transaction histories.
ChangeNOW offers a robust crypto exchange API for seamless integration.

Lots of projects are already building on the Cosmos ecosystem, including Binance Chain, Kava, Loom and Akash Network among many others. ATOM is the core currency of Cosmos ecosystem..

ATOM token has three functions: a spam-prevention mechanism, a staking and a voting medium in governance. Therefore, the more tokens are bonded, the greater economic security of the Cosmos network is. As a voting medium ATOM lets holders to vote on proposals.

The idea is to share a common ledger on a distributed database where all the account and transaction information can be stored and validated by independent servers. These servers can belong to any entity within a financial network — from banks to market makers.

As one of Ripple's primary objectives was to offer a cheap XRP exchange alternative, the Ripple cryptocurrency cost is relatively quite low in the digital cryptocurrency market. Today, Bitcoin is a currency governed by neither by a bank nor any central system; it operates with no intermediaries involved.

In the peer-to-peer Bitcoin network, Bitcoin owners can send or receive money directly. Transactions are recorded on the blockchain and verified using cryptography, which enhances the security and holds segregated user data. Bitcoin is truly universal, which means you can use it to buy any product or service. You can also sell BTC to obtain any other currency.

Bitcoin has a limited supply of 21 million, but the number will take a while to achieve. New Bitcoins are being generated every 10 minutes at the rate of 6.35 BTC per every new block. CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_NEW_GOLEM.ABOUT.HEAD: What Is Golem?
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_NEW_GOLEM.ABOUT.TEXT: Golem was created in 2016 and founded by a Polish engineer. The idea was to create the world's most powerful decentralized P2P network and use its capabilities for cloud computing, including mining. It is a kind of huge, the most powerful supercomputer in the world, capable of performing tasks of millions of users at the same time.

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_NEW_BITCOIN_CASH.ABO: Launched in 2017, Bitcoin Cash is a split of the prominent cryptocurrency Bitcoin. The concept of Bitcoin Cash was propagated by developers with concerns over scalability in the BTC blockchain. This led to a hard fork in the Bitcoin blockchain and thus came Bitcoin Cash (BCH). It offers the same principal features as Bitcoin, but with greater potential of scalability in its blockchain network.

BCH enables larger block size and thus possesses the capacity to process transactions at a faster scale. The shorter transaction time also leads to lower transaction fees. Over the years, Bitcoin Cash has also incorporated new features including increasing the amount of data stored on each block and facilitating developers to create new tokens on its blockchain.

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_NEW_POLKADOT.ABOUT.T: The project’s native token DOT serves mainly three purposes - governance, staking, and bonding. DOT token holders can vote, earn rewards on their stake or add new parachains by bonding. This way the project gives the users full control over the protocol - the ecosystem doesn't have miners. Instead, it leverages a proof of stake algorithm so the holders can manage protocol upgrades and other fixes. The project uses game theory and rewards users who behave honestly, while making cheaters lose part of their stake.
The DOT token has exploded in value in the fall of 2020, being one of the top crypto projects right now. The token has a maximum supply of 999 million coins.

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_USD_COIN.ABOUT.TEXTS: USD Coin is a stablecoin launched in September 2018. The term “stablecoin” refers to the fact that its value is backed with the US dollar, and you can always exchange 1 USDC with $1. Its purpose is to tokenize the dollar and enable people to send and receive fiat payments using blockchain technologies.

Centre consortium is behind the development of USDC. It’s a collaboration between Coinbase and Circle. Unlike other crypto assets, USDC can’t be mined or created in any other way except investing the appropriate amount of US dollars into the network.
The ecosystem behind USDC is stable, with more than 60 notable partners. The maximum supply of USDC is 2.59 billion, and USDC is considered to be the second-largest stablecoin in existence.

Chainlink was launched in September 2017, with a $32 million ICO that created exactly 1 billion LINK coins. It was founded by Sergey Nazarov and Steve Ellis, current CEO and CTO respectively. It wasn’t until May 2019 when Chainlink was launched on the Ethereum mainnet.

The most special thing about Chainlink is that information from the outside world doesn’t need to come from a single source of truth. Instead, sources of this information, known as oracles, form a decentralized network that makes sure data from outside the blockchain isn’t altered in any way.

The core idea behind it is to use a custom blockchain protocol (Ouroboros) that will outperform other blockchains, most notably Ethereum. The blockchain uses LINK as its coin. The all-time high price of LINK was $19.83 and its life cycle doesn’t contain many artificial jumps and volatility.

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_NEW_PIVX.ABOUT.TEXTS: PIVX stands for Private Instant Verified Transaction. From the name you can understand what the platform is focused on.
The primary task is to ensure the maximum level of anonymity of users and protection of financial transactions. To do this, the project team uses a huge variety of methods, and it really works.

Previously, the PIVX cryptocurrency was known as Darknet. It was aimed precisely at working in the darknet and carrying out illegal operations with “dark” purchases that can not be tracked. However, after the cryptocurrency boom in 2017, the owners decided to rebrand and bring the PIVX coin out of the shadows. First of all, this is due to the beginning of the use of PIVX in legal activities for the purchase of ordinary goods.

DEFI_COINS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.0.ANSWER:
DeFi, or decentralized finance, is a revolutionary movement within the crypto space that aims to recreate traditional financial systems — such as lending, borrowing, trading, and earning interest — on blockchain networks without relying on centralized institutions. Unlike banks or payment providers, DeFi protocols are governed by code and smart contracts. This gives users full control over their assets and enables permissionless access to financial tools.

The DeFi market has grown rapidly and now supports billions in total value locked (TVL), spread across hundreds of decentralized applications (dApps) and platforms.

At the core of this financial revolution are DeFi coins and DeFi tokens. These digital assets serve as the fuel of decentralized protocols. Some DeFi tokens, like UNI or COMP, are governance tokens that allow holders to vote on changes to the protocol.

One of the main advantages of DeFi crypto coins is their interoperability. Since most DeFi projects are built on Ethereum or compatible blockchains like Arbitrum, Optimism, or BNB Chain, users can move tokens between platforms seamlessly. As a result, entire DeFi ecosystems have emerged, enabling users to:
  • lend assets
  • provide liquidity
  • earn staking rewards
This fluid ecosystem allows for powerful synergies and new financial strategies that were not possible in the traditional world

How to exchange Bitcoin for cash

If you want to withdraw Bitcoin in cash, there are special Bitcoin ATMs installed all around the world, you can check if there is one in your area. ChangeNOW will implement fiat withdrawals by Q4 2020.
What is the Bitcoin exchange rate

You can check the current Bitcoin exchange rate in our exchange window, just type in the desired amount of BTC you want to exchange. Note that you can choose classic exchange rate, if you want to get the best deal at the moment of exchange or fixed rate, if you want to get the exact amount displayed.
How to start a Bitcoin exchange
To initiate Bitcoin exchange simply open ChangeNOW, select currencies you want to exchange, choose classic or fixed rate, tap on the ‘Exchange’ button and follow the instructions.
There are plenty of ways to exchange cryptocurrencies, however all of them have some disadvantages. Custodial exchanges are convenient, but they require registration and you hold your assets with personal information on a third party server. You can exchange it peer to peer without any mediator, however all the risks in this case are also on you.

The most secure way to exchange crypto is by using a non-custodial exchange that does not require registration, does not take hold on your funds and has earned users’ trust - such as ChangeNOW.
How to buy Bitcoin without an exchange

You can look for a cryptocurrency ATM in proximity to your location, or find a cryptocurrency broker to do it for you. If there aren’t any - use ChangeNOW, as it is always in your pocket and ready to help.

By halving the block rewards, Bitcoin mimics the extraction process of precious metals, becoming more scarce and theoretically more valuable over time. This scarcity principle is crucial for Bitcoin's value proposition as a hedge against inflation and a store of value.

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_BCH.TEXT_2: People new to crypto often find it hard to distinguish between Bitcoin Cash (BCH) and Bitcoin (BTC). The key difference is that Bitcoin (BTC) is the older chain, while the latter is a fork. While this coin was created in July 2017 through a hard fork of Bitcoin, the concept of it dates back to as far back as late 2015. At the time, there were growing concerns about Bitcoin’s scalability, and a section of the community wanted to accommodate more transactions by expanding the block size. One of the key proponents of a block size increase was Roger Ver (the main figure behind it). When consensus failed, Ver and like-minded investors forked Bitcoin and created Bitcoin Cash, a similar chain, but with a bigger block size. Since its launch, this coin’s price has moved in tandem with the rest of the crypto market and hit an all-time high of $4,355.62 in December 2017. It has since dropped and ranks, 5th, with a market cap of $5.493 billion. You can check out our 2020 Bitcoin Cash price prediction here.
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_BCH.TEXT_4: The main defining feature for this chain is scalability due to having a larger block size. This makes it one of the most reliable networks that can run without lagging due to congestion. It also has low transaction fees, and is one of the most secure blockchains in the market.

DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_REN_ARTICLE: REN decentralized finance project was created to allow for cross-chain transfer of coins. REN’s DeFi toolkit is quite original: users have access to Dark pools where transactions stay secure, anonymous and happen in a trustless environment. RenVM’s native REN tokens are used to pay fees for transactions that use the REN Virtual Machine. It is connected to Darknodes, which identify and process transactions between blockchains.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_LRC_ARTICLE: Loopring is a decentralized finance platform created to enable crypto movement between exchanges. It is not a traditional decentralized exchange, but rather a non-custodial order book running on Ethereum. LRC is a DeFi native token of the platform that is paid to miners, who ensure the order completion or cancellation on the Loopring DeFi system. LRC is a decentralized finance token that can settle transactions outside of the Ethereum network, hence lowering gas costs.

CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_XRP.TEXT_3: It is the 3rd largest cryptocurrency by market cap. It is also one of the oldest cryptocurrencies in existence, because the idea is a little older than Bitcoin itself. In 2005, Jed McCaleb came up with the idea of a financial services system that would act as a secure mode of payment for online transactions. He then approached Arthur Britto and David Schwartz, who built it with the help of Ryan Fugger, who as far back as 2005, had built such a system and named it Opencoin. It is the Opencoin system that formed the basis of Ripplelabs, and the cryptocurrency that debuted in the crypto markets as Ripple in 2012. Like most cryptocurrencies, XRP became most visible to the masses during the 2017 crypto rally. At the time, the crypto rallied to a high of over $3.5 on December 29th, 2017, and with a market cap of $73 billion. Like other cryptocurrencies, it has since corrected and currently has a market cap of about $13.67 billion.
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_XRP.TEXT_5: The currencies ledger has several features that put it at the forefront of the crypto revolution. One of its key features is speed. This currency is one of the fastest ways to send money globally. One can send money using it to any part of the world in under 4 seconds. Related to speed is the feature of scalability. A major advantage that centralized systems such as Visa have over cryptos is that of scalability. Most blockchains can handle very few transactions per second, making them impractical for large scale use in the finance industry. XPR does not have this problem and can consistently handle more than 1500 transactions per second. In fact, as of July 15th, 2019, it could handle over 65,000 transactions per second, making it competitive as a global payment system. The other key feature is decentralization. In the past, there were concerns that XRP is a centralized coin where RippleLabs controls all the validator nodes. This notion has since been dispelled as the network is run by more than 150 independent validators spread across the world. It is also for this reason that back in 2018, there was a rebranding from Ripple (XRP) to XRP (XRP). The goal was to help investors understand the difference between the company and the coin. Lastly, it is eco-friendly. Unlike proof-of-work coins that require energy to produce, the currency’s ledger settles transactions without mining.
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_XRP.TEXT_6: Why you need to convert XRP
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_XRP.TEXT_7: Like all other cryptos, you need a way to exchange Ripple to other coins, or cash. This can be for trading, or to get money for whatever reason. For trading purposes, one might find it necessary to convert Ripple to a stable coin such as Tether (USDT) in times of market volatility. To convert your XRP, you need an XRP Converter that is fast, easy to use, and has low fees. ChangeNOW.io is an amazing Ripple Converter, and offers all that, and more.
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_XRP.TEXT_9: ChangeNOW.io is one of the best cryptocurrency exchanges on the market, offering seamless and fast transactions. The platform allows users to exchange Ripple for BTC and more than 350 other currencies. The best part is that you do not need to register, you can exchange any amount of crypto you want - there is no upper limit.
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_XRP.TEXT_10: You can learn more about Ripple here. And if you want to explore cryptocurrencies in general, visit our Academy - here you can get all the basics and start your crypto journey well prepared!
CURRENCIES_EXCHANGE_XLM.TEXT_3: It was founded by Jed McCaleb who was also the co-founder of Ripple (XRP) and the infamous Mt.Gox exchange. Back in 2014, Jed created a website called the Secret Bitcoin Project and used it to find alpha testers. It is this project that paved the way for the creation of the Stellar Development Foundation that was developed in collaboration with Patrick Collision, the CEO of Stripe, with Stripe giving seed capital of $3 million. The project was launched as a decentralized network using Stellar Lumens (XLM) as the native cryptocurrency. Since then, the network has undergone lots of improvements, including the launch of a new consensus algorithm that was launched in 2015. Like all cryptocurrencies, this one has had its ups and downs in terms of price. It peaked in 2017 for $0.93 but has since corrected along with the rest of the market. You can check out our 2020 Stellar price prediction here.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_BNT_ARTICLE: Bancor is a decentralized finance protocol that allows to conduct peer-to-peer trades without third party involvement. Bancor’s basic blockchain is Ethereum; it maintains its smart contracts. For governance on the blockchain, the protocol uses a token called BNT. As a decentralized finance system, Bancor works on liquidity pools with multiple reserves, which are used to conduct smart contracts with BNT DeFi tokens. If you use Bancor as a DeFi platform, you have more than 100+ tokens to choose from.

DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_MKR_ARTICLE: Maker is a DeFi platform that is used to maintain the DAI stablecoin. DAI coin is based on smart contracts powered by Ethereum and Maker is a decentralized finance tool that stabilizes the price of DAI by creating new MKRs. DeFi protocols in place regulate the price of the stablecoin in a transparent way with collateralized loans. MKR as a decentralized finance instrument is one of the oldest on the market - it was created in 2014 and has since earned its popularity in the crypto community at large.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_LEND_ARTICLE: Aave is a DeFi protocol that is used to offer instant credit. Based on Ethereum, LEND is a decentralized finance tool working on a collateralized lending system. DeFi makes borrowing money simple - lenders provide liquidity by depositing money into a pool, while borrowers that need a loan have to provide collateral in other currency. Aave has been a household name in decentralized finance space since 2017, and has grown significantly over the years it’s been on the market.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_SNX_ARTICLE: Synthetics Network Token is a decentralized finance protocol based on Ethereum. SNX’s DeFi system is similar to Maker, where the platform’s tokens are used to create assets called Synths. Those synthetic assets copy the price of ‘real world’ assets. To buy and trade those, one has to use SNX - the decentralized finance token of the platform. The Synthetix DeFi project initially started as a conventional stablecoin Havven that got rebranded in late 2018.
DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_COMP_ARTICLE: Compound is a decentralized finance lending platform that supports multiple cryptocurrencies. Its native DeFi asset COMP (or cToken) is used as a basis of the Compound DeFi platform. Ethereum-based Compound offers decentralized governance on a blockchain. To vote for any changes to be made on the decentralized finance platform, COMP tokens should be bought with fiat or other cryptocurrencies.

DEFI_PORTAL.PROJECT_INFO_KNC_ARTICLE: An Ethereum-based Kyber Network is a decentralized finance project that provides instantaneous token exchange. Kyber Network’s DeFi protocol supports 70+ ERC20 projects and swiftness of conversion is provided by crypto funds called reserves. In order to use reserve pools, one has to pay a fee in the ecosystem’s native token, KNC. Decentralized finance projects like Kyber make usage of different dapps easy, as you don’t have to wait for token swaps and tools like KNC bring DeFi closer to everyday adoption of crypto payments.

BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.6.QUESTION: What Happens When All 21 Million Bitcoins Have Been Mined?
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.5.ANSWER: Miners face a significant challenge as the reward for their efforts is reduced, potentially impacting the profitability of mining operations. This adjustment period encourages technological innovation and efficiency improvements among miners, who must optimize their operations to maintain profitability under the new reward structure. Some miners may exit the market, leading to a temporary reduction in the network's hash rate until equilibrium is reached.
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.6.ANSWER: Reaching the 21 million cap is a long-term prospect, expected around the year 2140. After this point, miners will no longer receive new bitcoins for block rewards and will rely solely on transaction fees as compensation for their role in processing transactions and securing the Bitcoin network. This shift could fundamentally change the economics of mining and Bitcoin's security model.
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.7.QUESTION: Why Does Bitcoin Halve?
BITCOIN_HALVING.FAQ.ITEMS.7.ANSWER: The halving mechanism is Bitcoin's solution to prevent inflation and ensure a controlled supply, similar to the way central banks manage the supply of traditional currencies. By halving the block reward, Bitcoin ensures that its total supply will never exceed 21 million coins, making it a deflationary asset by design. This scarcity is a key factor driving Bitcoin's adoption and valuation as a digital store of value.

Your exchange is under review by risk control team and will be processed soon.
Why is there a KYC/AML procedure?

The crypto market is a subject of certain rules and regulations which make it mandatory for most crypto services to have certain procedures implemented according to European Anti-Money Laundering (AML) and Know Your Customer (KYC) regulations.

To proceed with the verification process, please contact support@changenow.io and follow the instructions provided. As soon as we receive the information required under KYC/AML regulations, the exchange will be completed.

To refuse the KYC procedure, please contact our support at support@changenow.io. In case of refusal, we will not be able to proceed with the transaction, and we will issue a refund to the originating address.

Please note that the procedure will differ if the address is suspected in connection to illegal activity. In such cases, we will not be able to issue a refund without KYC, and we will require additional documents. Please contact our support team for more information.

PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.7.ANSW:
Yes – as a partner, you can operate Permanent Exchange Addresses through our API and use them as a business. You can see API documentation here. There are several ways you can benefit from our solutions. For example, you can automatically convert the payments you receive into your target currency without any manual operations. More use cases are outlined on this page above.

PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.QUES: What exchange fees apply to Permanent Addresses?
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSW: The fees are the same you would see with a regular exchange: network fees and service fees. They are already included in the estimated rate you see. We guarantee no extra charges in the process – what you see is what you get.
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.QUES: What is the maximum amount I can exchange?
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSW: There is no limit to the amount you send – the system will process the exact amount of funds that was sent to the deposit address and pay it out to you in the target currency.
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSW: Sure! Our minimal amounts start with just $2 depending on the exchange pair.
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUES: Can I share my Permanent Addresses with other individuals?
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSW: Yes – the sender and the receiver of the funds do not have to be the same person. Use this to convert automated deposits instantly and receive the funds directly in your target currency.
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.QUES: How can I track the process and view my exchange history?
PERMANENT_EXCHANGE_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.ANSW:
The process can be tracked on the exchange page once you create it. Your exchange history is shown on the same page, so we recommend to bookmark it.
Additionally, all of your exchange history is stored in your Pro account – sign up and track you transactions with ease.

BITCOIN_HALVING.TIMER.ADDITIONAL_TEXT: Gear up for the monumental Bitcoin Halving 2024, a cornerstone event in the Bitcoin ecosystem, when the reward for mining bitcoins will be halved from 6.25 to 3.125 bitcoins. This event is pivotal, influencing Bitcoin’s inflation rate, scarcity, and potentially its market value. Let's dive  into the heart of Bitcoin's evolution with the 2024 Bitcoin Halving, exploring its impact on Bitcoin investment, Bitcoin's blockchain technology, and the broader financial markets.
BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.INTRO_TEXT: The Bitcoin Halving 2024 event stands on the horizon as a monumental occurrence within the cryptocurrency realm, symbolizing a crucial phase in the Bitcoin network's lifecycle that enthusiasts, investors, and financial strategists eagerly anticipate. This event, integral to Bitcoin's unique economic model, serves to maintain its deflationary nature by methodically decreasing the rate at which new bitcoins are introduced to the market. Specifically, the Bitcoin Halving 2024 will witness the reward for mining new blocks being halved from the current 6.25 bitcoins to 3.125 bitcoins, a change that directly affects miners but also has broader implications for the Bitcoin market and its valuation.
BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.TEXTS.0.DES: A Bitcoin halving event is a fundamental aspect of Bitcoin's design, occurring every four years, after all 210,000 blocks are mined. This mechanism ensures a gradual reduction in the rate of new bitcoins generated, extending the total time it will take for all bitcoins to be mined. It's a critical feature that helps combat inflation and mimic the natural scarcity properties of physical commodities such as  gold, making Bitcoin a 'digital gold' for the modern era. The halving is not just a technical event; it's an important moment that has historically influenced Bitcoin's price and various aspects of the cryptocurrency ecosystem.
BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.TEXTS.1.TIT: When is the Next Bitcoin Halving?
BITCOIN_HALVING.HOW_IT_WORKS.TEXTS.1.DES: Projected to occur in the third week of April 2024, the exact date of the next Bitcoin halving depends on the mining activity and can slightly vary. Cryptocurrency platforms and analysts closely monitor the Bitcoin blockchain to provide accurate countdowns and forecasts, preparing investors for the event. This anticipation builds a unique market environment where speculation, strategy, and historical data converge to forecast the potential outcomes of the halving.
BITCOIN_HALVING.DISCLAIMER: Disclaimer: Nothing presented on this page represents any kind of investment advice and is merely the opinion of the author. Investing into crypto is a high-risk activity and should be done only after extensive research.

HOW_IT_WORKS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSWER:
During the classic flow, each transaction may have its own unique exchange rate because of rate fluctuations, market conditions, and network fees. The rate might change at any moment; as a result, you might receive more or less than you thought you would.

Implementing fixed rate exchanges leads us to lay down a small reserve to guarantee your safety from exchange rate fluctuations. It's included into the rate you will see at the beginning of the exchange, no other fees included.

Because of the rate risks we take, the fixed rate may differ from the classic flow's rate. However, it gives our customers confidence in the amount they will receive.

PRICING_PAGE.SUBSCRIPTIONS.FAQ.0.CHAPTER:
Cashback payouts are typically processed within a few seconds. If your transaction takes longer, it may be due to the following reasons:
  • Cryptocurrency updates. If a currency or network undergoes an update, it can be temporarily disabled on our platform. Once the asset is reenabled, your funds will be sent directly to you.
  • Overloaded blockchain. If there are too many transactions waiting to be included in the blockchain, yours may be waiting for its turn. This usually resolves automatically once the overload is over.
If you have any remaining questions on your transaction, feel free to contact our support so we could help you with anything.

We work at a 50% loan-to-value ratio: if your collateral is 1 Bitcoin and it costs $60,000, you will get $30,000 in Tether. Why only 50%? At the 50% LTV, we guarantee we don’t sell your collateral before its price drops by 50%. If our LTV were 90%, we would give you a $54k loan for your $60k, but if the Bitcoin price dropped to $54k, we’d sell it. This is not safe. Low LTV secures your collateral from liquidation.

MEME_COINS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.0.ANSWER: Meme coins are cryptocurrencies that are inspired by internet jokes, trends, and pop culture. Unlike traditional digital assets, they heavily rely on community hype and social media buzz. Some of the top meme coins include Dogecoin (DOGE), Shiba Inu (SHIB), and Pepe (PEPE), which have gained mainstream attention.
MEME_COINS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSWER: To buy meme coins, you can either acquire them with fiat currency or exchange them for one of the 1,500+ tokens available on the ChangeNOW crypto exchange. If you want to swap crypto, go to the main page, choose the meme token you want to get (BONK, WIF, FLOKI, etc.), select the token you'd like to exchange, and proceed with the transaction. If you prefer to buy meme coins with USD, EUR, or another fiat currency, go to the Buy/Sell page on the ChangeNOW website, select your local currency, find the meme token you want, and complete the transaction.
MEME_COINS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER: Meme coins are similar to other cryptocurrencies in operation but usually lack strong utility or fundamentals. Their prices generally move based on speculation, online trends, and community engagement. A few of the best to buy are those meme coins building growing ecosystems with real-world applications, but most are highly volatile.

FOR_PARTNERS_PAGE.FAQ_SECTION.QUESTION_O:
A crypto affiliate program allows individuals and projects to earn commissions by promoting a cryptocurrency-related service. Typically, individuals sign up for an affiliate program and receive a unique referral link. They then promote this link through various channels such as websites, blogs, social media, or email marketing.

When someone clicks on the referral link and performs a desired action, such as making an exchange on a platform, the affiliate earns a commission. At ChangeNOW, you start with 0.4% fee and have the freedom to change it according to your preferences.

To track referrals and commissions, affiliate programs use cookies or unique tracking codes embedded in the referral links. This allows the program to attribute the referral to the correct affiliate.

FOR_PARTNERS_PAGE.FAQ_SECTION.QUESTION_T: What affiliate fees can I get with ChangeNOW?

With ChangeNOW's affiliate program, you can earn a default affiliate fee of 0.4% from every crypto swap processed through your platform. If you’d like, you also have the flexibility to choose a different percentage, making the fee higher or lower. The program offers various withdrawal options, allowing you to receive your earnings in 11 cryptocurrencies or fiat currencies. You can easily adjust your fee at any time by making a request to partners@changenow.io.
FOR_PARTNERS_PAGE.FAQ_SECTION.QUESTION_F: How is KYC done? How do you manage risky funds?

ChangeNOW doesn’t support any money laundering or other illegal activities; therefore, the service doesn’t enter any business agreements with individuals or business entities involved or suspected in such activities.
If you wish to know more about the KYC procedure, please consult our General FAQ: https://changenow.io/faq/kyc-aml-procedure
FOR_PARTNERS_PAGE.FAQ_SECTION.QUESTION_N: ChangeNOW’s fees are already included in the estimate and there are no hidden fees.
FOR_PARTNERS_PAGE.FAQ_SECTION.QUESTION_F: ChangeNOW’s KYC crypto procedure procedure is supported by an automated risk prevention system. If a transaction is marked suspicious by the system, the exchange is put on hold and the customer in question is then asked to confirm their identity. ChangeNOW doesn’t support any money laundering or other illegal activities; therefore, the service doesn’t enter any business agreements with individuals or business entities involved or suspected in such activities. Each KYC case is handled individually. If a certain client is eligible for the procedure since their transaction had been marked as suspicious, they will have a specific status update on the exchange page along with a “Verify” button; the button will lead to our KYC provider’s verification tool.If you wish to know more about the KYC procedure, please consult our General FAQ.

ChangeNOW exchange service is a non-custodial platform that prioritizes user control and ownership of assets.
However, ChangeNOW’s business partners can get access to crypto custody solutions with NOW Custody, a robust API that allows platforms to enhance their capabilities by accessing blockchain operations. It provides features such as receiving, storing, converting, and managing cryptocurrencies. With over 800 supported assets, immediate transactions and transfers, and reliable funds protection, NOW Custody empowers businesses in various industries.
FOR_PARTNERS_PAGE.FAQ_SECTION.QUESTION_N: For every swap, ChangeNOW finds the fastest and most user-profitable way to execute an exchange. It is crucial to us that the final amount you receive is as close to the estimate as possible. That's why we calculate all the possible fees for every transaction thoroughly and include them in the estimate.
If you wish to know more about all the fees in ChangeNOW transactions, please consult our general FAQ: https://changenow.io/faq/what-fees-are-there-during-an-exchange

ABOUT_PAGE.ABOUT_US.CONTENT.0.DATA.1.TEX: ChangeNOW works with 1,500+ assets, 70+ fiat currencies, and 110+ blockchains, covering major networks and emerging ecosystems. Swaps start from minimal amounts, have no upper limits, and typically finalize within minutes with highly competitive execution. Fees are built directly into the displayed rate, with fixed and floating options available. The service is accessible via web, mobile apps, and Telegram, with a consistent user experience across all entry points. ChangeNOW collaborates with leading wallet providers and industry partners, strengthening global accessibility and ensuring smooth integration. For businesses, ChangeNOW provides a flexible enterprise stack that makes it easy to add crypto functionality to any product. Its Crypto Exchange API lets companies integrate fast asset swaps directly into their services. NowCustody delivers secure storage for multi-asset portfolios, NowPayments enables global crypto payment acceptance, and NowNodes offers stable, high-performance access to blockchain infrastructure. These solutions help partners expand their offerings, streamline operations, and create new revenue channels with minimal overhead. Taken together, these capabilities position ChangeNOW as a dependable, full-featured crypto platform suitable for individual users, active traders, and businesses looking for a stable and trustworthy gateway into Web3.

DEFI_COINS_PAGE.FAQ.TITLE: FAQ
DEFI_COINS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSWER:
DeFi cryptos are coins and tokens used within decentralized finance protocols to enable lending, borrowing, trading, staking, and governance without intermediaries. Common DeFi coins include:
  • Uniswap (UNI) – governance token of the Uniswap DEX
  • Aave (AAVE) – used for lending and borrowing
  • Maker (MKR) – governance token for the MakerDAO/DAI stablecoin system
  • Compound (COMP) – rewards and governance for the Compound protocol
  • Curve (CRV) – powers the Curve stablecoin exchange
  • Synthetix (SNX) – enables synthetic asset creation
  • Balancer (BAL) – liquidity management protocol
  • Yearn Finance (YFI) – yield aggregation and automation
DEFI_COINS_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER:
Buying DeFi coins is now simpler than ever thanks to platforms like ChangeNOW. Whether you’re a crypto newbie or an experienced trader, you can easily access the top DeFi tokens without going through lengthy registration.

On ChangeNOW, you have two straightforward options:
  1. Swap any crypto to a DeFi coin — Instantly exchange over 900 cryptocurrencies (including BTC, ETH, and stablecoins) into popular DeFi crypto coins like LINK, UNI, AAVE, or MKR. The process is fast, secure, and requires no account.
  2. Buy or sell DeFi coins with fiat — Using your bank card or other fiat payment methods, you can directly purchase DeFi tokens or cash them out. This makes entering or exiting the DeFi market seamless, even if you don’t already hold crypto.
With competitive rates, real-time price tracking, and full support for the best DeFi coins, ChangeNOW is one of the easiest and most flexible ways to get started with DeFi crypto.

SELL_CRYPTO.FAQ.TITLE: FAQ
SELL_CRYPTO.FAQ.ITEMS.0.ANSWER: “Crypto to fiat” refers to the process of converting cryptocurrency (like Bitcoin, Ethereum, or other digital assets) into traditional government-issued currency — also known as fiat — such as USD, EUR, or GBP. This is useful when you want to spend your crypto in the real world, pay bills, or simply move profits to your bank account.
SELL_CRYPTO.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSWER: The best way is to use a trusted crypto-to-fiat exchange like ChangeNOW. You can cash out Bitcoin to your bank account, or sell Ethereum and other altcoins to get paid directly in USD, EUR, or your local currency — quickly and securely.
SELL_CRYPTO.FAQ.ITEMS.2.QUESTION: How do you exchange crypto for cash?
SELL_CRYPTO.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER: Choose the crypto you want to sell, select a fiat payout method (like Visa, PayPal, or bank transfer), enter your details, and confirm the rate. That’s it — your crypto is converted to real money with no hidden fees.
SELL_CRYPTO.FAQ.ITEMS.3.QUESTION: How long does it take to receive fiat after selling crypto?
SELL_CRYPTO.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER: Most transactions are completed within 5–15 minutes. However, fiat payout time can vary depending on the selected method — cards are usually instant, while bank transfers (SWIFT/SEPA) may take 1–3 business days.
SELL_CRYPTO.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSWER: First, check if the processing time for your chosen method has passed. If it has, contact ChangeNOW support with your transaction ID — they usually respond within minutes and help resolve most issues quickly.
SELL_CRYPTO.FAQ.ITEMS.5.QUESTION: Are there any fees when converting crypto to fiat on ChangeNOW?

FAQ.Q28_TEXT_1:
A classic rate cryptocurrency exchange is an exchange performed at the current most profitable rate on the market. 
An expected rate is the current exchange rate you will get. However, the cryptocurrency market is highly volatile and you should account for that.
FAQ.Q28_TEXT_2: During the classic rate exchange, each transaction may have its own unique exchange rate because of price fluctuations, market conditions, and network fees. The rate might change at any moment; as a result, you might receive more or less than you thought you would.
FAQ.Q29_TEXT: The expected rate is the rate at this exact moment. You must understand that it takes some time to send the deposit and confirm the transaction so, with the market volatility, you might get a bit less or more than you thought you would.
FAQ.Q38_TEXT:
Please keep in mind that our deposit addresses for BTC conform to the SegWit standard.

It's technically impossible for ChangeNOW to withdraw any coins except for BTC from SegWit BTC addresses since neither BCH, LTC, or BSV support SegWit at the moment. 

When it comes to refunds, note that ChangeNOW’s technical department is able to refund only BTC from SegWit BTC addresses. No other crypto assets, including but not limited to LTC, BSV, BCH sent to a SegWit BTC address could be refunded.

Our team assists with setup, testing, optimization, and long-term maintenance, ensuring your web3 crypto wallet operates smoothly. Dedicated support channels are available for ongoing development needs.
CRYPTO_EXCHANGE_FOR_WALLETS.FAQ.5.ANSWER: No, there are no hidden fees. All exchange rates are transparent. Users select an exchange pair and receive the actual exchange rate via the ChangeNOW API. Our API provides both floating and fixed exchange rates.
CRYPTO_EXCHANGE_FOR_WALLETS.FAQ.6.ANSWER: Security is a top priority. Our infrastructure follows industry best practices, including encryption, secure key handling, and continuous monitoring. This ensures safe transactions for every cryptocurrency wallet API integration, protecting both users and developers at every level.

ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUESTION: Can a coin or token be delisted?
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER: Standard requirements for crypto exchange listing on ChangeNOW depend on where the asset is traded. It must be available on a CEX or DEX and have a supported trading pair (such as BTC or USDT). For DEX assets, the pair should reach at least $100,000 in total volume. For CEX assets, the pair should have at least $300,000 in daily trading volume.
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSWER: Yes. Assets can be removed if they no longer meet the agreed requirements. This may happen if trading volume drops below $100,000, the project is publicly identified as a scam, legal authorities require removal, or based on ChangeNOW’s internal decision. The team may reach out to discuss the situation if needed. Also you can learn more in our Asset Listing Terms.
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.QUESTION: How long does the listing process take?
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.6.QUESTION: How much does it cost to list a coin or a token?
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.6.ANSWER: The cost depends on the integration complexity and the time required for implementation. Pricing is determined individually for each asset. Existing partners may receive discounts based on their monthly volume.To receive a price calculation for your asset, please fill out our listing form.
ASSET_LISTING_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.ANSWER:
Listing times vary based on the network type and integration complexity. We generally follow these timeframes:
  • Tokens on popular networks such as ERC20, BEP20, or TRC20 typically take up to one week.
  • Tokens on less common networks usually takes about two weeks.
  • Full blockchain or mainnet integrations: building a custom network integration requires between two and eight weeks.
Our team provides a specific estimation at the start of the process after the initial asset review.

AI_HUB_PAGE.PREVIEW.TITLE: Use crypto with AI
AI_HUB_PAGE.PRODUCT_FAMILY.LIST.FIRST.SU: The most structured way for AI to use ChangeNOW. A core part of how we support agent-ready exchange experiences.
AI_HUB_PAGE.PREVIEW.SUBTITLE: ChangeNOW is building an ecosystem of AI-native products that are easy to discover, understand, and use for both humans and agents
AI_HUB_PAGE.PRODUCT_FAMILY.TITLE: ChangeNOW AI product family
AI_HUB_PAGE.PRODUCT_FAMILY.MAIN_BLOCK.SU: ChangeNOW Buddy allows humans to use a familiar chat interface to work with exchange in a more natural way.
AI_HUB_PAGE.PRODUCT_FAMILY.LIST.SECOND.S: Our OpenAPI specification gives developers and AI products a machine-readable way to understand endpoints, operations, and integration flows.
AI_HUB_PAGE.PRODUCT_FAMILY.LIST.THIRD.SU: llms.txt helps language models and AI tools locate the most relevant information about ChangeNOW and its API, reducing computational costs.
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.TITLE: What comes next
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.FIRST.TITLE: Shared toolset
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.FIRST.TEXT: Instead of multiple isolated tools, your experience will benefit from a single entry point, documented workflows, and continuous support. This results in better performance, faster development, and less time spent on troubleshooting.
AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.FIRST.SUBTITL: The AI tools we provide can show which crypto assets we support, including essential market data – reliably and blazing fast!
AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.SECOND.TITLE: Track transaction status
AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.SECOND.SUBTIT: You definitely want to check if your exchange is going smoothly, especially in a hurry. Don’t worry, we’ve still got you covered. Our status API makes status checks as easy as refreshing a webpage.
AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.THIRD.SUBTITL: Enjoy exchanging 1,000+ currencies, built right into your AI tool. The full power of ChangeNOW is now available everywhere – from your home computer to your personal messaging chatbot.
AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.FOURTH.TITLE: Get support
AI_HUB_PAGE.AI_ACTION.LIST.FOURTH.SUBTIT: Something happened? Don’t panic: our rich knowledge base is also accessible by AI. Just ask your assistant – it will find an answer or redirect you to 24/7 human support.
AI_HUB_PAGE.BENEFITS.TITLE: Benefits for everyone
AI_HUB_PAGE.BENEFITS.LIST.FIRST.TITLE: Humans
AI_HUB_PAGE.BENEFITS.LIST.FIRST.TEXT: AI brings some magic into your routine exchange process by making it more intuitive. ChangeNOW Buddy helps people get estimates, create swaps, and check their transaction statuses more easily.
AI_HUB_PAGE.BENEFITS.LIST.SECOND.TITLE: Agents
AI_HUB_PAGE.BENEFITS.LIST.SECOND.TEXT: ChangeNOW is ready for the next generation of AI-driven finance. Our toolset give agents a standardized way to discover, understand, and interact with the platform.
AI_HUB_PAGE.HOW_IT_WORKS.LIST.FIRST.TEXT: AI access ChangeNOW ecosystem in real-time via optimized entry points.
AI_HUB_PAGE.HOW_IT_WORKS.LIST.SECOND.TEX: Then it connects to our workflows and matches your request.
AI_HUB_PAGE.HOW_IT_WORKS.LIST.THIRD.TEXT: Once everything is clear, AI executes your request and completes its task!
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.TITLE: Why become AI-native
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.SECOND.TITLE: Regular updates
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.0.ANSWER: Our MCP server expands your agent's capabilities by integrating it with ChangeNOW. The setup process varies for different platforms. Ask you agent if it supports MCP protocol and attach our server URL for instructions: mcp.changenow.io/mcp
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.LIST.FIRST.TEXT: AI agents, wallets, assistants, and automation tools need more than a traditional interface. They work best with specialized MCPs, clear and structured documentation, and predefined scenarios.
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.LIST.SECOND.TITLE: Easier discovery and easier action
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.LIST.SECOND.TEXT: We are making the ChangeNOW ecosystem easier for agents to find, easier to understand, and easier to execute crypto-oriented workflows.
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.LIST.THIRD.TITLE: Better experience for everyone
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHY_AI.LIST.THIRD.TEXT: Even if you don't run AI agents, you can benefit from this these updates too! For example, ChangeNOW Buddy allows everyone to interact with the ecosystem. Any extra setup is not required.
AI_HUB_PAGE.BUILT_FOR_SAFETY.TITLE: Built for safety
Our AI solutions don't reveal or interact with your private keys. In fact, no sensitive data is disclosed at all! Our AI & API solutions only create verifiable exchanges with user-defined parameters, without involving any actual blockchain transactions.
AI_HUB_PAGE.BUILT_FOR_SAFETY.LIST.SECOND: All our tools are thoroughly tested and instructed to operate in line with safety standards. We require the AI to output the exchange ID and other parameters, including direct links. Anyone can validate that the created exchange matches the initial intent.
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.THIRD.TITLE: Ecosystem for AI
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.THIRD.TEXT:
Our long-term vision is to make the entire ecosystem accessible for AI. Whether your agents need to:
  • Integrate NOWPayments payment gateway
  • Control non-custodial wallets with NOW Wallet
  • Directly access blockchain data via NOWNodes
  • Or even manage your ChangeNOW Pro account
Everything is designed to work seamlessly and ensure interoperability.
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.THIRD.TEXT.MO: Our long-term vision is to make the entire ChangeNOW ecosystem — including NOWPayments, NOW Wallet, NOWNodes, Pro accounts, and more — AI-accessible. Whatever crypto task you have in mind, our products are designed to work seamlessly together, ensuring interoperability across the ecosystem.
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.TITLE: FAQ
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.QUESTION: How to use ChangeNOW Buddy?
AI_HUB_PAGE.WHAT_NEXT.LIST.SECOND.TEXT: This page will update regularly – adding AI product updates, MCP capabilities, and more workflow documentation. Stay tuned!
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.1.ANSWER: ChangeNOW Buddy is a ChatGPT-based chatbot accessible via the website or the ChatGPT app. OpenAI Terms of Use apply, and an external account may be required.
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.2.ANSWER: It means the exchange is being made easier for AI systems to discover, understand, and use through standardized interfaces, public docs, and machine-readable resources.
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.3.ANSWER: We are continuously working to align with modern AI discovery standards, such as OpenAPI, LLMs.txt, and more. This ensures that your AI agents understand our services clearly and interact reliably.
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.QUESTION: Is this only for developers?
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.4.ANSWER: No. Our tools are designed for everyone running AI agents and tools.
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.QUESTION: What is available today?
AI_HUB_PAGE.FAQ.ITEMS.5.ANSWER: Our AI resources include the MCP server, ChangeNOW Buddy, OpenAPI spec, and llms.txt.
